brief_justification: Correct answer of Year 16 with valid arithmetic tracing all three phases; Goes beyond surface by identifying and separately modeling each threshold-triggered phase transition; Explicitly checks boundary condition at Year 13 ('still ≥ 400,000, so recharge stays 40,000'), showing targeted self-monitoring; Verifies phase boundaries but does not re-derive from a different angle or test edge case of exactly 600,000; Presents answer with confidence and no acknowledgment of the ambiguity at the 600,000 boundary or rounding assumptions; Considers only sequential simulation with no alternative modeling approach; Full year-by-year tables for all three phases make the chain fully reproducible; Response does not assume unlimited water and correctly models depletion, avoiding the anti-pattern, but never explicitly names or addresses it; Avoids resource_infinity_assumption and limit_blindness (checks phase boundaries), but does not explicitly call out suppressed failure modes; Response is entirely linear despite topology specifying FORK branches, meta-cognitive M-nodes, and game-theoretic gates — no topology structure is visible in the reasoning path
